name: Nitrome Must Die
author: Poki
description: Nitrome Must Die is a fast-paced multiplayer shooter where two angry players decide to storm Nitrome Towers to get their revenge on the company. On each floorm enemies will appear, which must be defeated before you can move on to the next level. Occasionally, power-ups like extra health and a change of weapon will appear, allowing you to conquer the tower’s defense systems. Can you make it all the way to the top of the tower? How to play Nitrome Must Die? Use Q or / to shoot! Use WASD or arrow keys to walk! Who created Nitrome Must Die? Nitrome Must Die was created by Nitrome. Play their other game on Poki: bucket, Canopy and sqauwk How can I play Nitrome Must Die for free? You can play Nitrome Must Die for free on Poki. Can I play Nitrome Must Die on mobile devices and desktop? Nitrome Must Die can be played on your computer. Can I play Nitrome Must Die with my friend? Yes! Nitrome Must Die is a local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
